title: Squid Milking
description: Squid Milk! The delicious taste of rotting squid
body:
**Have you ever looked at a squid and thought, "That looks refreshing?" No? Well, now you can!**



Re-added squid milking, so now players can finally get the squid milking fix they've been craving since 2011. 
![Squiggly Farms Presents...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e69585607de9745ee9b06d08012b073ad54b9ec_0.webp)



<details>
<summary>HOW TO MILK A SQUID:</summary>
  
1. Find squid

2. Bring empty bucket

3. ???
   
4. PROFIT!


</details>

Inspired by: [Ten Things You Probably Didn't Know About Minecraft](https://youtu.be/sriHoJkuDUw?si=ndjBm6H-W3mol8R5)
